metrics.name: stackra.marketing.events.captured_total
metrics.description: Number of marketing events captured (persisted to marketing_events with status='pending'). Rate signal for business milestone volume.

metrics.name: stackra.marketing.events.delivered_total
metrics.description: Number of events where every eligible provider delivery succeeded. The primary success metric.

metrics.name: stackra.marketing.events.partially_delivered_total
metrics.description: Number of events where SOME providers succeeded + SOME dead-lettered.

metrics.name: stackra.marketing.events.failed_total
metrics.description: Number of events where every eligible provider dead-lettered. Every increment is a fully lost paid conversion signal.

metrics.name: stackra.marketing.events.suppressed_by_consent_total
metrics.description: Capture-time consent-suppressed events. Spike drives MarketingConsentSuppressionSpikeNotification.

metrics.name: stackra.marketing.events.superseded_total
metrics.description: Older event marked superseded by a newer same-dedup-key row. Non-zero is normal (retries at the domain layer).

metrics.name: stackra.marketing.events.capture_duration_ms
metrics.description: MarketingEventObserver.creating latency. Should stay < 20ms P99 (consent snapshot + attribution snapshot + eligible-provider computation).

metrics.name: stackra.marketing.deliveries.attempted_total
metrics.description: attempt_number is bucketed as string ('1', '2', '3', '4+') to bound cardinality.

metrics.name: stackra.marketing.deliveries.failed_total
metrics.description: error_code_bucket is pre-computed (auth_failure / invalid_payload / rate_limit / server_error / network / timeout) to bound cardinality.

metrics.name: stackra.marketing.deliveries.rate_limited_total
metrics.description: 429 or pre-dispatch RateLimitGate refusal. Spike indicates tenant ceiling breached or provider-side throttle.

metrics.name: stackra.marketing.deliveries.suppressed_by_consent_total
metrics.description: revoked_between_capture_and_dispatch true = user revoked consent AFTER capture; the re-check-at-dispatch saved us.

metrics.name: stackra.marketing.deliveries.dispatch_duration_ms
metrics.description: End-to-end DispatchToProviderJob latency (gate check → transform → HTTP → response parse → observer bookkeeping). Provider-specific — Meta CAPI typically < 500ms P99; GA4 < 300ms; GTM Server / Custom Webhook varies.

metrics.name: stackra.marketing.deliveries.http_duration_ms
metrics.description: response_status_class = '2xx' / '3xx' / '4xx' / '5xx' / 'timeout' / 'network_error'. Just the HTTP round-trip.

metrics.name: stackra.marketing.circuit_breakers.opened_total
metrics.description: Every increment is a P1 signal. Should stay near 0 in a healthy system.

metrics.name: stackra.marketing.circuit_breakers.half_open_probes_total
metrics.description: outcome = 'succeeded' / 'failed'.

metrics.name: stackra.marketing.circuit_breakers.currently_open
metrics.description: Current count of open circuit-breakers per provider across all tenants.

metrics.name: stackra.marketing.dead_letters.created_total
metrics.description: Every increment is a paid conversion loss. Ops + finance both care.

metrics.name: stackra.marketing.dead_letters.replayed_total
metrics.description: outcome = 'succeeded' / 'failed'.

metrics.name: stackra.marketing.dead_letters.unresolved
metrics.description: Current count of unresolved dead letters per provider.

metrics.name: stackra.marketing.roas.value_delivered_cents
metrics.description: Cumulative delivered revenue (from event.value_amount_cents where status='delivered') per provider + utm_source_bucket. utm_source_bucket = 'google' / 'meta' / 'tiktok' / 'linkedin' / 'organic' / 'referral' / 'direct' / 'other' (bucketed to bound cardinality).

metrics.name: stackra.marketing.entitlement.gate_refusals_total
metrics.description: Number of route hits refused by the entitlement middleware. Product signal for upgrade-CTA impressions.

metrics.name: stackra.marketing.reconcile.stuck_events_found
metrics.description: ReconcileMarketingEventStatusJob finding count. Should stay at 0.
